grants.comment: claude-runner coder sessions: read-only estate visibility (resource state + runtime logs) — the agent debugs deployed apps but cannot change Azure outside GitHub Actions.

claude-runner-TEST broker: drive the experimental homelab (Azure Arc) session backend — open an SSH-over-Arc tunnel into the dockhost machine and run bootstrap/lifecycle commands (Run Command). Scoped to the single dockhost resource in rg-homelab (cross-RG, so it cannot live in the test repo's own Bicep). Sandbox-only; remove if the homelab backend experiment is dropped. See claude-runner-test PLAN.md.
